prompt: Oracle card illustration, vertical portrait format. A monk-bishop figure (Saint Gregory Palamas) emerging from deep golden-amber smoke and luminous mist, ethereal translucent ghostly figure with a long beard and bishop's robes materializing from abstract turbulent background. Semi-abstract expressionist painterly style, visible impasto brushstrokes, atmospheric oil painting technique. Monochromatic gold-amber-dark brown palette with white-hot divine light (uncreated Tabor light) radiating from the figure's chest outward. Dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, smoky diffused edges, the saint dissolving into billowing clouds of golden light and ancient parchment-colored vapor. Rough bilateral symmetry. Dark amber-brown vignette at edges brightening to incandescent gold-white center. Four faint scroll or book shapes floating in the luminous fog around the figure — barely visible, like echoes. Expressive gestural brushwork, mystical spiritual mood, no hard outlines, everything rendered as swirling vaporous clouds of divine light. Classical fine art quality, rich textured canvas grain visible. No text.
